Great action, brilliant amount of humor, fantastic fight scenes and other special effects, kinda like Tarantino but way more fun! It would be worth to buy the tickets even only for dialogues, laughing out loud! But you get so much more than that, we've enjoyed it a lot :-) ***LITTLE DIPLOMATIC SPOILER*** Maybe few indiscrepancies in the scenario (*"please would you fall from the roof little boy but don't you hurt yourself too much 'cause I'm gonna need you later! Keeping my fingers crossed for happy falling" or "let's just delete the most brilliant cardio-surgeon for no reason whatsoever" ;-D) but STILL, all in all the movie made much more sense than anything I've seen in months

Having read the book, I couldn't be more offended by this steaming pile of sh*t. As if the whitewashing of the all Japanese characters isn't enough - and even then, they found two non-white actors to play two of the Japanese characters because,, what NO Asian actors were available? - but about 70% of what happens in the trailer only never occurs in the book. And for the current biggest crime lord in Japan ... they cast Michael Shannon, rename the character The White Death, and come up with all these ridiculously stereotyped masks for his "gang of assassin"??  NONE OF IT IN THE BOOK. What a steaming pile of crap, the filmmakers know, I guess, that if you give an American audience their explosions and violence, not one damn other thing (plot, character, story) matters.

Theory on why I think Eddie WONT die.

So, I've seen a lot of talk about Eddie Munson getting killed off in Vol. 2 of Stranger Things. And I have a lot of thoughts about it all.
The thing I've been seeing most people say is that Eddie is going to sacrifice himself and die after his guitar moment in the Upside Down. And that he has to die because the people are Hawkins are after him because they think he killed Chrissy. I don't know if anyone else noticed this, but Dustin is on the roof of the trailer with Eddie when he's playing his guitar. If Eddie was sacrificing himself to save Dustin, why would he be on the roof with him? He can't jump off and run without getting hurt. They used a ladder to get on top of the trailer. There's no roof access.
Also, in the trailer, there's a shot of Dustin and Eddie back to back with weapons then another one where Dustin is cheering and Eddie is next to him. So, I'm assuming whatever the plan with the guitar is works. And Eddie is there to celebrate with Dustin. (Also, monopoly already spoiled that Eddie is luring the bats from Vecna’s lair he’s not saving Nancy hence why Nancy is okay in the teasers)
Anyway, I see where people are coming from, but my problem with all of that is that it's too predictable. In general, killing Eddie is too predictable. I shared part of an article recently where Joseph Quinn said how they're pushing for Jonathan and Eddie to interact in Season 5. The response to that post was mixed.
Some people think he's lying, which I get, or that the comment means nothing. The thing is, Jonathan and Eddie interacting in Season 5 is the most mundane thing to lie about. Like, what kind of fake tease is that? Ya know? So, I don't think that was a lie. I think it was something that just slipped out. I think his death is too predictable and the Duffer brothers want you to think that he will die. Also, they mentioned that a character will die and it will be a huge impact etc so it must be someone from the original cast as Eddie is new.
On top of that, I think he could be valuable going forward especially that he’s bonding with Dustin its like he might possibly replace Steve as the babysitter? In other words, I don't think his purpose in Stranger Things is limited to his story this season.
Also the whole town is out to find Eddie and the rest of the gang they’re obviously all gonna witness something all together that will clear Eddie’s name otherwise what would be the point of them searching for him if he dies in the upside down, that storyline would lead to nothing and Eddie would die with a bad reputation! 

Rant over :)

      Pengatur Dunia = Pengatur Akhirat

Ada  5 hal  yang berlaku di seluruh dunia  (international)  =
1] Bahasa international = bahasa inggris  dari inggris percaya kepada Allah bernama Tuhan YesUs : Pencipta Dunia.
2] Mata uang international = US $  dari amerika serikat percaya kepada Allah bernama Tuhan YesUs : Pencipta Dunia.
3] Kalender international=kalender tahun masehi.  Hari  ini   8   juni   2022  masehi
(masehi=Mesias=Tuhan YesUs).
4] Lagu  kebangsaan = semua negara harus punya lagu kebangsaan. (lagu kebangsaan Indonesia : Indonesia Raya)
Cara beribadah umat kristen, ada : lagu.
5] Keselamatan = hal - hal keselamatan untuk manusia yang dipakai hampir di seluruh dunia  (international,  pakai bahasa international : bahasa inggris) =
zebra   cross ,  do not   cross   police line,
red    cross   international  :   palang  merah  international .
